reviews_data.review_text: I came here and ordered the sami bowl, and it was amazing!! I had an incredibly nice worker named Rylee help explain the basics of açaí to me. She was super duper sweet and very helpful. Overall, my experience at this restaurant was amazing and i’d definitely come here again.
So perfect so clean and so yum!!! This place will be so so so successful here and great location in Stonecrest!!!!!! This was my first time here and I will be back many many many times!!!!!!!
The Sami Bowl is SO SO good. I highly recommend this place the açaí is so yummy 😋
Love this place! Best bowls in the area, and staff is incredible. Will be back for sure!

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: So clean and such amazing workersss!
The pink base is top tier!! 😋
Palm berries is one of the top açaí bowls in Charlotte-I will definitely be coming back!

Going here was a great experience, with great service and incredibly kind employees!! Michael the manager was very helpful when I was torn between two bowls, but I ended up getting the Dubai chocolate bowl and it was amazing!!! Truly great service and food.
The food was really good and the workers were all super nice!!

Love this new location, very nice!
Tried the UBE base and it was great, wish they would keep it. lol
Michael was very nice and welcoming.

I recently discovered Palm Berries, so was THRILLED when I saw that a new one opened in Ballantyne. The staff and service have been top notch and each bowl is consistently delicious. I've been 3 times in 6 days! Looking forward to this being a staple.
went to the grand opening of palm berries and it was amazing! best açaí bowls in charlotte. i did the create your own bowl and it was so yummy!! will definitely be back
By far the best acai bowls in Charlotte! I loved the protein bowl, it’s a perfect combination of flavors!
Yet, ANOTHER Palm Berries that has top notch service, açaí, and atmosphere! So thankful to get my protein bowl closer to the office now! 🍓

I came here and ordered the sami bowl, and it was amazing!! I had an incredibly nice worker named Rylee help explain the basics of açaí to me. She was super duper sweet and very helpful. Overall, my experience at this restaurant was amazing and i’d definitely come here again.
So perfect so clean and so yum!!! This place will be so so so successful here and great location in Stonecrest!!!!!! This was my first time here and I will be back many many many times!!!!!!!
The Sami Bowl is SO SO good. I highly recommend this place the açaí is so yummy 😋
Love this place! Best bowls in the area, and staff is incredible. Will be back for sure!
